name: ejentum-mcp
description: Four cognitive harnesses (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory) as MCP tools any agentic client can call.
long_description: Drop-in cognitive scaffolding for agentic AI. Exposes the four Ejentum harnesses as MCP tools your agent calls per task: harness_reasoning (causal analysis, multi-step planning), harness_code (generation, refactor, review), harness_anti_deception (sycophancy, hallucination, manipulation pressure), harness_memory (perception, drift detection). Each tool returns a structured cognitive scaffold (failure pattern to avoid, procedure, suppression vectors, falsification test) that the calling LLM absorbs internally before responding. Catches LLM failure modes that produce confidently wrong answers.

ejentum_api_key.title: Ejentum API Key
ejentum_api_key.description: Get one at https://ejentum.com/pricing (free tier: 100 calls). Stored locally; never sent anywhere except the Ejentum API.
